evals.expected_output: The skill detects unresolved '⚠️ Confirm:' items, stops before writing any code, lists them, and resolves them with the user before continuing.
evals.setup: Generate a canvas with /spdd-canvas and leave at least one '⚠️ Confirm:' line unresolved.
assertions: The skill does not execute any Write or Edit on source code before resolving pending items
The skill explicitly lists every '⚠️ Confirm:' line found
The canvas is updated with the decisions taken
The canvas moves to 'Status: Confirmed' before implementation begins

evals.expected_output: With no pending items in the canvas, the skill proceeds without interruptions following the section order: Entities → Structure → Operations → Norms → Safeguards.
evals.setup: Generate a canvas with /spdd-canvas and manually resolve all '⚠️ Confirm:' lines.
assertions: The skill does not interrupt execution to ask for confirmations
The canvas moves to 'Status: Confirmed' before touching source code
Files are created or edited in the order of the canvas sections

evals.expected_output: When the real code diverges from what the canvas describes, the skill stops, explains the discrepancy with concrete values, and proposes a canvas update before continuing.
evals.setup: Generate a resolved canvas and intentionally introduce a discrepancy: change a field name or path in the canvas so it does not match the actual project code.
assertions: The skill stops when it finds the discrepancy instead of continuing silently
The explanation mentions both the canvas value and the actual value found in the code
The skill proposes a concrete canvas change before resuming
Implementation continues after the user confirms

evals.expected_output: After implementation, a docs/features/SLUG.md file exists with business rules, flows, and technical notes listing real file paths — readable by a non-technical person.
evals.setup: Generate a resolved canvas for a simple feature.
assertions: The file docs/features/SLUG.md exists after implementation completes
The file has a business rules section with at least 2 concrete rules
The file has a flows section describing the feature steps
The technical notes list real file paths from the project
The document contains no generic placeholders or unfilled template text

evals.expected_output: When done, the canvas has Status: Implemented with today's date and the project compiles without errors.
evals.setup: Generate a resolved canvas for an implementable feature in the project.
assertions: The canvas has 'Status: Implemented' when done
The canvas contains a '> Implemented: YYYY-MM-DD' line with the correct date
The project compiles or starts without errors after implementation
